titleStmt.title: SII 26.532: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 532. (A.R. No. 504 of 1909.) PUDUPĀḶAIYAM, SRIVILLIPUTTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the same temple.

p.hi: Tribhº Sundarapāṇḍyadēva II: Year 11, day 590 = 1248-49 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places.

It contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pūmalar tiruvuṁ poru śeya maḍantaiyum, etc., and mentions the queen Ulagamuḻuduḍaiyāḷ. It states that the king was sitting on the couch called Maḻavarāyaṉ in the sleeping apartment of the palace in Māḍakkuḷakkīḻ Madurai.

It is stated that the king, at the request of Ayyaṉ Maḻavarāyar, gave land, 12 mā in extent, as tax-free maḍappuṟam in favour of Īśāṉadēvar, a disciple of the āchārya of the Tiruvārūr Kṛishṇa-Gōlaḵi-maṭha, and his disciples, residing in the Eṉakkunallaperumāl-maḍam, caused to be built by a certain Oruvāṟuṇarndāṉ Eṉakkunallaperumāḷ of Rājavallapuram on the south-eastern side of the eastern entrance at Karuṅguḷam alias Śātavāśakanallūr in Veṇbaikkuḍināḍu. It is also stated that the gift-land belonged to a certain Dēvaṉ Paraśirāmaṉ alias Pāṇḍyadēvaṉ and that the tax-free gift should take effect from the 11+1st year in the reign of the king, and that the income as detailed below derived from the land should be paid to the above-mentioned maṭha Quarter kāśu in respect of certain specified levies, 6 kalam of paddy per unit of a certain kind of land (name lost), land 3/4 kalam of paddy per piece where kuṟuvai was grown, 1(1/2) kalam of paddy per piece where Aippaśi-kuṟuva was grown, 1(1/4) kalam of paddy per piece where Tulā ••• was grown, and two drammas per piece where gingelly, and cereals like varahu, etc., were grown.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmalar tiruvum poruceyamaṭantaiyun tāmaraikkuvimulaic ceyappuyat tiruppa vetanāvil veḷḷitaṭṭāmaraik kātalmātu kaviṉ peṟat tiḷai
ppa veṇṭiraiyuṭutta maṇṭiṇi tākkaittiru nilamaṭantai yurimayiṟ kaḷippac camaiyamu nitiyun tarumamun taḻaippa yimaiyavar viḻākkoṭiyiṭantoṟu meṭuppak karu
yararuntoḻil veḻvicceṅkaṉal vaḷaraccurutiyun tamiḻuñ col vaḷaṅ kulavapporutiṟavāḻi pūtalañ cūḻatara Orukai yirucevi mummata nāṟkoṭṭayirāpatamutal
ceytikkoṟṟat teṇṭicai yāṉai yerutta merikkaṇṭa nāṭemateṉak kayal kaḻikūrak kocalan tuḷuvaṅ koṅku kiraṅ kuccaram pocaḷa maka
tam poppaḷam puṇṭaraṅ kaliṅkamiḻaṅ kaṭāraṅ kauṭan teliṅkañ coṉaṅkañ ciṉa mutalāya vitimuṟai tikaḻa vevveṟu vakutta mutunilakkiḻamaiyil muṭipuṉai ve
ntaṟ korutaṉināyakaṉeṉṟulakettat tirumuṭi cūṭic ceṅkoloccik koṟṟattaraḷak kuḷirkuṭai niḻaṟ kiḻkkaṟṟaikkavari kāvalar vica viṭukatir navamaṇivira- siṅhāsaṉattuṭaṉ muṭi cūṭiyuyar kulattiruveṉā
matumalaṟ karaṅkuvittup pāttipar maṅkaiyar tiraṇṭu vaṇaṅkuñ ceṉṉiyilc cuṭaroḷi mauliyiṟ cuṭaroḷi meliṭac civanta Iṇaimalar ciṟaṭik kamala matukaraṅ kamalameṉṟaṇukum Ulaka muḻutuṭai
runtaruḷiya māmutal matikkulam viḷakkiya komutaṟ komāṟapaṉmarāṉa [tribhuva]ṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrīsundarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉoṉṟu nāḷ Aiññūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟiṉāl
māṭakkuḷakkiḻ maturaikkoyilp paḷḷiyaṟaik kūṭattu paḷḷippiṭa maḻavarāyaṉil Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu veṇpaikuṭi nāṭṭuk karuṅkuḷamāṉa cātavācakanallūṟ pāvaṉaṅkaḷi
l kiḻaittiruvācalukkun teṉkiḻakkāka ceyvitta Eṉakku nallaperumāḷ maṭattu vattikkum tiruvārūr kraṣṇa koḷakimaṭattu Ācāriyar śiṣyaril Īcāṉatevarum Avar cantāṉattut tapasya
taruḷiṉapaṭi Ivaṟkum Ivar san=tāṉattut tapasyaṟkum bhojaṉam Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuvaṉavukku rājavallapurattu Oruvāṟu Uṇarn=tar Eṉakku nallaperumāḷāṉa tamiḻppallavaraiyar perāl ceyvitta
ṭṭuk karuṅkuḷamāṉac cātavācakanallūr tevaṉ paracirāmaṉāṉa pāṇṭiya tevaṉukkuc cātavācakanallūr mepāl karuṅkuḷattil kāṇiyāṉa muṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu nāccivayakkal taṭi Oṉṟu nilam mukkāṇi mun
lum Itaṉ kiḻakkuttaṭi Oṉṟu nilam kāṇiyaraikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraiyeyaraikkālum Itaṉ vaṭakkut taṭi nālu nilam kāṇiyaraikkāṇi kiḻaraikkālum Āṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟuttaṭi Oṉṟu nilam
lum kaṅkaṉ vayakkal taṭi Oṉṟu nilam mukkāṇi yaraikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻeḻu māvaraiyum Āka nilam muṉṟumāmuntirikaik kiḻaraiyum Ivvūr vaṭapāl Ātiyūṟ kuḷattil Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟut tevaṉ
Orumā muntirikaikkiḻ mukkāle mākāṇiyum muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu yātavarāyaṉ ceykku vaṭakiḻakkut taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻmukkālum Itaṉ meṟkut taṭi Ira
tirikaik kiḻaraikkālum Itaṉvaṭakkut taṭi muṉṟu nilam Araikkāṇik kiḻaraiye yaraikkālum puḷikkukkiḻakku vayakkalukkut teṟku taṭi Oṉṟu nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikai kiḻ mākā
kāṇikkiḻeḻumāvaraiyum Ivvūr melpāl putukkuḷattu mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu Āṉaiyāṇṭāṉ taṭikkut teṉkiḻakkuk karuṅkuḷattukku nir pāykiṟa kālukkuk kiḻak cemmoṭi vāykkālukku meṟkum taṭipala
lum Āka nilam Araiyum kaṟkayattuppaṟṟi Āṟṟukkut teṟkut toṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭu māvum Āka nilam Araiyeyiraṇṭumāvum patiṉorāvatiṉetirāmāṇṭu mutal mutal maṭappuṟa yiṟaiyili yiṟuppatākavum Iṟukkumiṭattu
mutaruvatāṉa Accum kāriyavārāṭciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupīli cantuvikkirakappeṟum vācalpeṟum Ilāñciṉaippeṟum poṉvariyum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa māttāl kācu kālum payi
māttāl Ivvūṟ kaṭamai yiṟukkuṅkālāl nellu Aṟukalamum kuṟuvai viḷainta nilattukku Ivvaricaiyil Oṉṟu mukkālum Aṟpacik kuṟuvai viḷainta nilattukku Oṉṟu pātiyum tulā
Oṉṟukālum Eḷ varaku tiṉaippullu Iṟuṅku viḷainta nilattukku māttāl tiramam Iraṇṭum Āka Ivvāṇṭu mutal Iṟuppatāka Iṟai kaṭṭappeṟa veṇumeṉṟu Aiyyaṉ maḻavarāyar namakku coṉṉamaiyi
rur kraṣaṇamaṭattu Ācāriyar ciṣyaril Eṅkaḷ tevarum Ivar san=tāṉattut tapasyaṟkum bhojaṉa muḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuvaṉakku Irājavallapurattu Oruvāṟuṇarntāṉ Eṉakkunallaperumāḷāṉa ta
kku veṇpaikkuṭināṭṭu karuṅkuḷamāṉa cātavācakanallūr tevaṉ paracirāmaṉāṉa pāṇṭiyatevaṉukkuc cātavācakanallūr mel pāl karuṅkuḷattil kāṇiyāṉa muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nāccāṉ vayakkal
rayeyaraikkālum Itaṉ kiḻakkut taṭi Oṉṟu nilam kāṇiyaraikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraiye yaraikkālum Itaṉ kku taṭi nālu nilam kāṇiyaraikkāṇik kiḻaraikkālum ṅkaṇṇāṟṟut taṭi Oṉṟu nilam
yakkal taṭi Oṉṟu nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻeḻumāvaraiyum Āka nilam muṉṟu mā muntirikaik kiḻaraiyum Ivvūr vaṭapāl Ātiyūr kuḷattil Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu tevaṉ vayakkal
ḻ mukkāle mākāṇiyum muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu yātavarāyaṉ ceykku vaṭakiḻakku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ mukkālum Itaṉ meṟkut taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikiḻ
ṉṟu nilam Araikkāṇik kiḻaraiye Araikkālum puḷikkuk kiḻakku vāykkālukkut teṟku taṭi Oṉṟu nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ mākāṇiyum Āka nilam Iraṇṭumā Araikkāṇik kiḻeḻumā
ḷattu mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu Āṉaiyāṇṭāṉ taṭikkut teṉkiḻakkuk karuṅkuḷattukku nirppāykiṟa kālukkuk kiḻakkum cemmoṭi vāykkālukku meṟku taṭi pala nilam nālumā mukkāṇi kiḻaraikkālum
ṟṟukkut teṟkut toṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭumāvum Ākanilam Araiye Iraṇṭumāvum patiṉ Oruvatiṉetirāmāṇṭu mutal maṭapuṟa Iṟaiyili yiṟuppatākavum Iṟukkumiṭattuk kaṭamai
tāṉa Accum kāriyavārāṭciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantuvikkirakappeṟum vācalpeṟum Ilāñciṉaipeṟum poṉvariyum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa māttāl kācu
lattukkuk kaṭamai māttāl Ivvūrk kaṭamai yirukkuṅkālāl nellu Aṟukalamum kuṟuvai viḷainta nilattukku Ivvaricaiyil Oṉṟu muk kālum Aṟpacik kuṟuvai viḷainta nila
ttu viḷainta nilattukku Oṉṟukālum Eḷ varaku tiṉaippul Iṟuṅku viḷainta nilattukku māttāl tiramam Iraṇṭum Āka Ivvāṇṭu mutal Iṟuppatāka namvariyilār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvariyu
kaikkoṇṭu Ippaṭi candrātittavaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭivittuk koḷkaveṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār vai tirumallināṭṭu taṭaṅkaṉṉic ciṟṟūruṭaiyā
kurukulattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cevvirukkaināṭṭu nallūr Araiyaṉ viratamuṭittāṉāṉa pallavarai(ā)yaṉeḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 26.532 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
